SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.storage

Class PooledLmtpDelivery

java.lang.Object
com.mimecast.robin.storage.PooledLmtpDelivery
public class PooledLmtpDelivery extends Object
Shared LMTP delivery helper that reuses the server connection pool.

  • Constructor Details

    • PooledLmtpDelivery

  • Method Details

    • deliver

      public boolean deliver(Session sourceSession, long maxAttempts, int retryDelaySeconds)
      Delivers all envelopes in the supplied session using the shared LMTP pool.
      Parameters:
      sourceSession - Session containing one or more LMTP envelopes.
      maxAttempts - Maximum number of delivery attempts.
      retryDelaySeconds - Delay between attempts.
      Returns:
      True when every envelope was delivered successfully.

    • deliverAttempt

      protected PooledLmtpDelivery.DeliveryAttemptResult deliverAttempt(Session sourceSession, LmtpConnectionPool.PooledLmtpConnection pooled) throws IOException
      Throws:
      IOException
